Trivial issues:

From both the definition and the usage of PortArgs.init_new(), it may be better to be decorated with staticmethod rather than classmethod.
Even for a classmethod, the convention is typically using cls instead of self.

sglang.title: [Bug] Fix the Image Input of Batch Generation
sglang.author: OBJECT907
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
When using the OpenAI API for batch generation, all prompts receive the same image, specifically the last image in the batch. Upon investigation, I discovered a bug in openai_api/adapter.py:


Issue in v1_chat_generate_request (line 824): The image_data_list gathers all images for the bat

sglang.title: Add the ability to enable and disable the Profiler via HTTP API.
sglang.author: Abatom
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

Add /start_profile and /stop_profile to enable and disable the profiler for long-term monitoring.

Usage example

Set environment variables to specify the save path for trace files, for example:

export SGLANG_TORCH_PROFILER_DIR=/home/work/


Enable and disable profiling.

curl http://lo

sglang.title: Added a "Back To Top" Button
sglang.author: JanumalaAkhilendra
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
For longer README files, users may need to scroll through multiple sections to find specific information. A "Back to Top" button provides a quick way to return to the top, saving time and effort. It allows users to navigate the document efficiently without having to manually scroll up, pa

sglang.title: Fix constrained decoding

sglang.bodyExcerpt: Fix a bug for constrained decoding. It was introduced by #1556 (comment)

sglang.title: Add back data parallelism
sglang.author: merrymercy

sglang.title: [engine] support async and streaming
sglang.author: ByronHsu
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

To support async + streaming in Engine. This PR supports four combinations of async and streaming

sync + non streaming
sync + streaming
async + non streaming
async + streaming

And also add examples of how to use engine to do batch inference and construct custom server
Modifications


A

sglang.title: fix missing ignore_eos in v1/chat/completions
sglang.author: learninmou
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Fix the missing ignore_eos parameter in the /v1/chat/completions API.
In some certain performance benchmark scenarios, we need the model to generate a fixed number of tokens. To prevent the process from ending prematurely due to encountering the eos/stop token, the ignore_eos=True parameter needs to

vllm.title: [Misc] Collect model support info in a single process per model
vllm.author: DarkLight1337

vllm.title: [Misc][LoRA] Support loading LoRA weights for target_modules in reg format
vllm.author: jeejeelee
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
When LoRA weights are saved as adapter_model.bin, vllm does not support reading target_modules in regular expression format . This PR mainly adds support for loading LoRA weights in this form.
ping @DarkLight1337

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix priority in multiprocessing engine
vllm.author: schoennenbeck
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Priority was not properly propagated to the actual engine in the multiprocessing implementation.
FIX #9272

Thank you for your contribution to vLLM! Before submitting the pull request, please ensure the PR meets the following criteria. This helps vLLM maintain the

vllm.title: [Model] Support Mamba
vllm.author: tlrmchlsmth
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This is closely based on vLLM's Jamba implementation. It also has several changes and fixes to deal with the fact that there is no KV cache at all.
Changes in this PR

Added the Mamba model definition and integration tests.
Factored the Mamba cache management used by both Mamba and Jamba into a mamb

vllm.title: [Kernel] adding fused moe kernel config for L40S TP4
vllm.author: bringlein
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Adding triton configurations for fused_moe on L40S (mixtral-8x7b with TP4). Results in up to 10% more throughput, ~6% better latency.
Latency measurements with:
for bs in 1 2 4 8 16 32 64; do python3 benchmarks/benchmark_latency.py --model=/models/mixtral-8x7b --input-len 1000 --output-len 50 -tp 4

vllm.title: [Model] Add GLM-4v support and meet vllm==0.6.2
vllm.author: sixsixcoder
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Overview
This PR support the glm-4v-9b multimodal model while maintaining compatibility with chatglm.
This PR was inspired and reused some code here #5358
This PR is updated from #8663
FIX #5417
FIX #6097
Changes

Add vision_config for ChatGLMConfig
Add glm4 vision encoder in vllm/model_executor/mod

vllm.title: [Doc] Compatibility matrix for mutual exclusive features
vllm.author: wallashss
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Greetings,
We did a study of mutual exclusive features on vLLM and consolidated in a compatibility matrix.
We propose to add the compatibility matrix to the documentation pages to help users to quick consult to plan their implementation or study.
Following the table in markdown for quick checking an

vllm.title: [Bugfix][CI/Build] Fix docker build where CUDA archs < 7.0 are being detected
vllm.author: LucasWilkinson
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
FIX #9226
In this dockerfile the archs being detected by torch is 5.0;8.0;8.6;8.9;9.0;9.0a we should ensure we prune off 5.0 for the kernels where we build for all target archs. This PR does that by pre-filtering the CUDA_ARCHS (target archs) by the CUDA_SUPPORTED_ARCHS:
  cuda_archs_loose_intersect

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Sets `is_first_step_output` for TPUModelRunner
vllm.author: allenwang28
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
#8378 introduced is_first_step_output - intended to be an optional field, but is not set as such. This broke TPU's multi-step runner. This PR fixes this by setting this variable in a similar way to multi_step_runner.
BEFORE SUBMITTING, PLEASE READ THE CHECKLIST BELOW AND FILL IN THE DESCRIPTION ABOV

vllm.title: [BugFix] Fix tool call finish reason in streaming case
vllm.author: maxdebayser
vllm.bodyExcerpt: When a named function is passed to tool_choice with streaming the finish_reason was "stop" instead of "tool_calls".

vllm.title: [SpecDec] Remove Batch Expansion (2/3)
vllm.author: LiuXiaoxuanPKU
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Follow up of #8839.
We will use flash_attn_varlen_func for MQA scorer. Therefore, we can support different propose lengths for different requests in the batch, which is essential for ngram and dynamic speculative decoding.
The following are some preliminary benchmark numbers with MQA scorer compared
